evidence_quotes.quote: farming of high arousal emotional responses
including video games under this initiative could improve it even further

paragraphs.text: As someone who has worked over a decade in the field of IT, both during business hours and in their spare time, I've felt the importance of legislation like this first hand. The farming of high arousal emotional responses, and predatory practices are harmful on too many levels to count. It's an incredible initiative, and I believe it's going to improve conditions of people, human beings, who deserve better than being treated as merely consumers and commodities. I believe including video games under this initiative could improve it even further, a lot of these corporations have been treating their customers with open disdain for too long. In many cases, this dismissive attitude is turned on their own developers as well, who put their time, blood, sweat and tears into these works of art, they so carelessly destroy with no recourse. I hope these entities can be made to take the responsibility they ought to shoulder, in exchange for the fruits they harvest, I want to see nothing more, and nothing less, than fairness. The innovation and its speed possible in this field is hard to keep up with for law makers, and I appreciate the fantastic work, and effort being put in with this initiative. I just hope it's the best version it can be, which we see brought before the European Union.
